rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Gov't Code §2306.1124, which governs department approval of plans involving public parks. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The department may not approve a plan described by Section 2306.1123(b) if the department determines that a property proposed under the plan is a public park.
_note: No conflict; the rule addresses housing department plan approval for public parks, not property tax exemptions.
